EN-ES Printable Resource

Bilingual School Supplies Labels & Classroom Essentials (K-2)

A comprehensive set of bilingual (English-Spanish) labels for K-2 classrooms, focusing on high-frequency school supplies, essential visual routines, and core classroom rules to support ELL newcomers and promote language immersion.

TopicSchool Supplies
Age BandK-2
Pack Typeclassroom labels
LanguageEN-ES

✨ What's Inside

  • 15 classroom labels
  • 5 routine cards
  • 4 classroom rules
  • Teacher notes & answer key

📖 How to Use

Print full-size labels for walls, doors, and large bins. Print small-size labels for individual supplies, pencil boxes, and smaller containers. Display visual routine cards in a prominent area and review daily. Post classroom rules where visible to all students.

Mar 18, 2026lanternell.comPage 5 / 6
LanternELLTeacher Notes📄 Printable Pack

Teacher Notes

🎯 Objective

To create an immersive, language-rich environment for K-2 students, especially ELL newcomers, by labeling essential classroom items, routines, and rules in both English and Spanish.

💡 Suggested Use

Print full-size labels for walls, doors, and large bins. Print small-size labels for individual supplies, pencil boxes, and smaller containers. Display visual routine cards in a prominent area and review daily. Post classroom rules where visible to all students.

📦 Materials Needed

  • Printer
  • Laminator (optional)
  • Scissors
  • Tape/Adhesive
  • Velcro dots (optional for routine cards)

🔀 Differentiation Tips

  • Encourage students to point to labels as they use items.
  • Use labels during vocabulary games and matching activities.
  • Have students repeat the words in both languages.
  • Pair new labels with gestures or actions for better comprehension.
📄 Terms of Use — personal-classroom-use
✅ Print for your students & classroom use.❌ Do not share, redistribute, or resell files.🏫 School license: support@lanternell.com
